# Minecraft RPG Modpack

This modpack makes Minecraft feel like a proper RPG. Explore dungeons, fight bosses, and find cool loot. Level up, get new skills, and gear up however you want.  

## Things you can do
- Go on quests and find hidden surprises.  
- Level your character and unlock abilities.  
- Get new weapons, armor, and items.  
- Play alone or with friends.  

It’s still Minecraft, just with more danger, more fun, and way more RPG vibes.

# NOTICE: There are problems with the dependencies, so if you encounter one problem, download the mods or fabric loader versions in the fabric error screen
